---
title: "Codebook: Social Media Addiction Dataset"
author: "Mathilde Gourlin"
date: "2026-01-26"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


PSTAT 131 



**Student_ID**

- Description: Unique identifier assigned to each respondent

- Type: Numeric (integer)

- Role: Identifier (not used as a predictor in modeling)

**Age**

- Description: Age of the respondent

- Type: Numeric (integer)

- Units: Years

**Gender**

- Description: Self-identified gender of the respondent

- Type: Categorical

**Academic_Level**

- Description: Highest academic level completed or current level of study

- Type: Categorical

- Examples: High School, Undergraduate, Graduate

**Country**

- Description: Country of residence of the respondent

- Type: Categorical

- Notes: Rare categories were grouped into an “Other” category using step_other() before being converted into dummy variables.

**Avg_Daily_Usage_Hours**

- Description: Average number of hours per day spent on social media

- Type: Numeric (continuous)

- Units: Hours per day

**Most_Used_Platform**

- Description: Social media platform used most frequently by the respondent

- Type: Categorical

- Notes: Rare platforms were grouped into an “Other” category during preprocessing

**Affects_Academic_Performance**

- Description: Indicator of whether social media use negatively affects academic performance

- Type: Categorical (Yes/No)

**Sleep_Hours_Per_Night**

- Description: Average number of hours slept per night

- Type: Numeric (continuous)

- Units: Hours

**Mental_Health_Score**

- Description: Self-reported mental health score

- Type: Numeric (integer)

- Scale: Higher values indicate better mental health

**Relationship_Status**

- Description: Self-reported relationship status of the respondent

- Type: Categorical

- Examples: Single, In Relationship, Complicated

**Conflicts_Over_Social_Media**

- Description: Frequency of conflicts caused by social media use

- Type: Numeric (ordinal)

- Scale: Higher values indicate more frequent conflicts

**Addicted_Score**

- Description: Self-reported social media addiction severity score

- Type: Numeric (integer)

- Scale: 1 (low addiction) to 10 (high addiction)

- Role: Response variable
